allow: PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit -p client/tsconfig.json 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30; "client typecheck exit=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(npm run build -w client 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5; "build exit=$LASTEXITCODE")
PowerShell(npm run build -w client 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 4; "build exit=$LASTEXITCODE")
